{{Infobox madra
| name = Blackflame madra
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Blackflame madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame]] [[madra]] is a volatile and destructive energy characterized by its black and red coloration. It is associated with the [[Path of Black Flame]], which mimics the power of black [[dragons]] and carries a primal, aggressive, and furious temperament. This [[madra]] is highly effective at piercing defenses, destroying materials, and adding destructive intention to weapons. When used in techniques like the [[Burning Cloak]] or [[The Dragon Descends]], it can manifest as liquid flame, claws, or even a roaring [[dragon]]. However, the power is inherently corrosive; it eats away at the user's physical body, madra channels, and soul. This internal erosion can lead to madness, reduced lifespans, and physical degradation, which contributed to the downfall of the [[Blackflame family]]. To prevent permanent damage or blockages in the spirit, users must often cleanse their channels with [[pure madra]]. While it is a ravenous force that leaves nothing behind, it can be combined with other energies to create complex effects.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame]] [[madra]] is a type of [[madra]] that can billow out as black fire and is notoriously difficult to [[Forge]]. This substance has caused damage to [[Orthos]]'s spirit over many centuries and possesses the ability to ravage both the mind and body. When focused, it can behave like a hungry beast, though it can also be moved by feel without the need for convoluted patterns. [[Lindon]] has demonstrated its utility by igniting tinder, spraying it himself, or using a pulse of the energy to blow apart a soldier. Furthermore, [[Orthos]] can spray the [[madra]] from his mouth, and when [[Lindon]] utilizes the [[Fierce Fire Robe]] technique, he is shrouded in a thin haze of black and red fire. Despite its power, using this [[madra]] can cause damage to a user's madra channels.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] can billow out as black fire.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] is a type of [[madra]] that can ravage the mind and body.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] has caused damage to [[Orthos]]'s spirit over centuries.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] is difficult to [[Forge]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] can behave like a hungry beast when focused.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|When used, the [[Fierce Fire Robe]] technique shrouds the user in [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[aura]] produced by the [[Fierce Fire Robe]] technique is a thin haze of black and red fire.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] used [[Blackflame madra]] to ignite tinder.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] uses a pulse of [[Blackflame madra]] to blow apart a soldier.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] can cause damage to a user's madra channels.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] can be moved by feel without relying on convoluted patterns.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] is a type of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]] can be sprayed from [[Orthos]]' mouth.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can spray [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] cycles [[Blackflame madra]] to fight the chill of the wind.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] can flare [[Blackflame madra]] from his shell.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of Black Flame]] makes [[Lindon]] aggressive and impulsive.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame madra]] to prevent being burned by [[Orthos]]' shell.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] launched a pulse of [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame madra]] to warm himself.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] sensed something that might have been [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] fears [[Blackflame madra]] could scorch his soul.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can pull [[Blackflame madra]] from his core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian]] is a victim of [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame madra]] as an unfocused barrier for defense.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame madra]] to mold [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame madra]] feels angry and aggressive.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses a finger of [[Blackflame madra]] to cut through an indentation in space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wove threads of [[pure madra]] and [[Blackflame madra]] together.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] used a [[Forged claw]] of [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An explosion of [[Blackflame madra]] occurred near Serpent’s Grave.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Blackflame madra]] is used in combat.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame madra]] is used by [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blackflame madra]] splashed against the barrier around [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] uses [[Blackflame madra]] to forge claws.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"Black fire billowed out of the turtle's mouth,"<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
